user.title: Anker Prime Charger (A2345)
user.description: Sign in with the Anker account that owns the A2345 charger.

manual.title: Add charger manually
manual.description: No A2345 was found automatically. Enter the charger serial number from the Anker app/device label.

error.cannot_connect: Could not sign in or reach Anker Cloud.
error.no_compatible_devices: No compatible Anker Prime Charger A2345 was found.

dump_last_payload.name: Dump last payload
dump_last_payload.description: Write the last decoded MQTT payload to config/anker_prime_charger_a2345_last_payload.json.

device_sn.name: Device serial
device_sn.description: Optional A2345 serial number. Leave empty to dump all configured chargers.

include_raw.name: Include raw envelope
include_raw.description: Include the raw MQTT envelope if debug data is available. Sensitive keys are redacted.

dump_payload_history.name: Dump payload history
dump_payload_history.description: Write recent decoded MQTT payloads to config/anker_prime_charger_a2345_payload_history.json.

device_sn.name: Device serial
device_sn.description: Optional A2345 serial number. Leave empty to dump all configured chargers.

include_raw.name: Include raw envelope
include_raw.description: Include raw MQTT envelopes if debug data is available. Sensitive keys are redacted.
